languages.text: {n}Завидев вас, архмилитант сотворяет аквилу и кланяется, ожидая разрешения говорить.{/n}
{n}Upon seeing you, the Arch-Militant makes the sign of the Aquila and bows, waiting for permission to speak.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Завидев вас, архмилитант сотворяет аквилу и кланяется, ожидая разрешения говорить.{/n}

languages.text: {n}君に会って、大軍人は真っ直ぐに立ち、アークラ号の印を刻む。そして静まり、話す許可を待つ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing you, the Arch-Militant stands up straight and makes the sign of the Aquila, then goes still, waiting for permission to speak.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seni gören Başmilitan, Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıp eğiliyor ve konuşma izni vermeni bekliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing you, the Arch-Militant makes the sign of the Aquila and bows, waiting for permission to speak.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seni gören Başmilitan, Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıp eğiliyor ve konuşma izni vermeni bekliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一看到你，这位首席战士就做出双头鹰手势，俯身鞠了一躬，等待你准许她开口。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing you, the Arch-Militant makes the sign of the Aquila and bows, waiting for permission to speak.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一看到你，这位首席战士就做出双头鹰手势，俯身鞠了一躬，等待你准许她开口。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als sie dich sieht, macht die Erzmilitantin das Zeichen des Adlers und wartet auf die Erlaubnis, zu sprechen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing you, the Arch-Militant makes the sign of the Aquila and bows, waiting for permission to speak.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als sie dich sieht, macht die Erzmilitantin das Zeichen des Adlers und wartet auf die Erlaubnis, zu sprechen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lorsqu'enfin elle remarque votre présence, l'archimilitante s'incline et fait le signe de l'Aquila en attendant d'avoir la permission de parler.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Al verte, la Archimilitante hace el signo del Aquila y una reverencia mientras espera el permiso para hablar.{/n}
